behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names handleOpenResponsesHttpRequest, runResponsesAgentCommand, agentCommandFromIngress, senderIsOwner, allowModelOverride, and the suppression strings; file path is discoverable via standard repo layout and the tests' hard-coded path.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes constraints (non-owner, boolean typing, no sentinel defaults) without specifying exact line edits or literal replacement text.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check AST patterns (param presence, non-true initializer, boolean type) which accept any correct implementation, not specific variable names or line positions.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke Node.js to parse TypeScript AST and inspect structural properties, not just string matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual param wiring, non-true value passthrough, and both call sites updated; a stub cannot satisfy test_sender_is_owner_flows_from_params or test_call_sites_pass_non_owner.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all stated constraints: no hardcoded true, flow-through, both call sites, boolean typing, suppressions, model override, stub check.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have section comment headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Config-derived) and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code modification, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames, function names, and paths are consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the function/file generically (`handleOpenResponsesHttpRequest`) which is the task domain; no specific line numbers cited.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
